detail: Task 0 complete: refactored all model-level Write/Edit tool calls in workflow.md to Bash (cp, mkdir -p, python3 -c, rm -f, echo >>). Affected: step 3 add/replace/delete/migration actions, step 4 state file writes, step 5 gitignore fix, step 9 upgrade state writes, step 10 hash-drift restore. Three EDD evals written before implementation.
